notes:
🚀 Beeftext AI v0.1.3 Clean Rebuild

Fix: Ensure snippet triggers only at word boundaries (e.g. no more accidental triggers like 'ss' inside 'password').

Enhancements from previous versions:
- Improved keyword generation (1 symbol + 3 letters).
- Auto-generate metadata (description & group).
- Duplicate keyword warning system.
- Re-indexing tool for embeddings.
- Increased AI memory context to 100 snippets.
